name: KPIDashboardGenerator

neutralConcepts: alertFired must be computed based on configured thresholds (FREEDOM config key: warehouse_kpi_alert_thresholds)
alertFired is a derived boolean — never hardcoded threshold in service code

ironRules.rule: KPI values MUST be tenant-scoped — no cross-tenant KPI visibility.
alertFired MUST be computed from FREEDOM config thresholds — never hardcoded. Hardcoded threshold is a MACHINE violation.

keywords: KPI dashboard generator tenant scoped alertFired FREEDOM config thresholds KPISnapshotGenerated warehouse.kpi.snapshot
